name: Shem
oracleText:
Whenever another Human or Cleric enters the battlefield under your control, you gain 1 life.
At the beginning of your end step, if you gained 3 or more life this turn, create a 1/1 white Human creature token.
flavorText: "Blessed be the Lord God of Shem." — Genesis 9:26
notes: Created from a checked Early World card list item; mechanics pending. Classics theme art uses a reusable Wikimedia Commons Medhurst illustration of Noah's family coming out of the ark.
title: Bearer of the Line
